seoTitle: ESIONTECH FPGA Solutions | Application Solutions | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore ESIONTECH FPGA solutions for industrial automation, communications, and AI applications. Technical support and reference designs available.

solutions.title: Industrial Automation Controller
solutions.description: Complete FPGA-based control solution for industrial automation using ESIONTECH industrial-grade FPGA with real-time processing and multiple protocol support.
solutions.longDescription: The Industrial Automation Controller solution leverages ESIONTECH ESI20K-IND industrial-grade FPGA to create a versatile, high-performance control platform. This solution integrates multiple industrial communication protocols, real-time motion control, and safety features in a single programmable device. The FPGA architecture enables parallel processing of control algorithms, communication stacks, and I/O handling with deterministic timing. Key benefits include reduced component count compared to traditional PLC architectures, flexible protocol support, and the ability to customize control algorithms for specific applications. The solution is suitable for PLCs, CNC controllers, robotic controllers, and process automation systems. LiTong provides complete reference designs, IP cores, and technical support for this solution.

coreProducts.reason: Industrial-grade FPGA with wide temperature range and robust reliability
Professional development environment for complex industrial designs

keyFeatures: Real-time motion control with deterministic timing
benefits: Reduced component count vs traditional PLC
Flexible protocol support in single device
coreAdvantages: Parallel processing architecture outperforms sequential processors
solutions.implementationGuide: Implementation steps: (1) Hardware Design - Use reference design including power supply, I/O protection, and communication interfaces. (2) FPGA Configuration - Implement control algorithms, communication stacks, and safety logic in ESI20K-IND. (3) Software Development - Create HMI and SCADA integration using provided APIs. (4) Testing - Validate timing, safety functions, and protocol compliance. (5) Certification - Complete SIL 2 certification if required. (6) Production - Deploy with long-term supply agreement.

customerCases.challenge: Needed flexible controller supporting multiple protocols for different customers
customerCases.solution: Implemented ESIONTECH FPGA-based controller with configurable protocols
customerCases.result: Reduced controller variants from 5 to 1; 50% reduction in inventory costs; Field protocol configuration capability; Passed CE and UL certification
customerCases.feedback: The FPGA-based controller gives us unprecedented flexibility. We can now support any protocol our customers need.

customerCases.challenge: Required high-speed multi-axis control with custom interpolation algorithms
customerCases.solution: Deployed ESIONTECH FPGA controller with custom motion control IP
results: 50% faster processing than previous DSP solution
customerCases.result: Achieved 1ms control loop time; Custom spline interpolation implemented; 50% faster processing than previous DSP solution; Improved surface finish quality
customerCases.feedback: The FPGA's parallel processing capability transformed our CNC performance.

faeInsights.content: Having implemented this industrial controller solution for multiple customers, I can share key insights. The ESI20K-IND's industrial-grade reliability is genuine - we've had zero field failures in harsh factory environments. The key to success is proper I/O protection design. Industrial environments have extreme EMI and voltage transients. Follow the reference design's protection circuits exactly. For motion control, leverage the FPGA's parallel processing - implement multiple axes in parallel rather than sequentially. This gives you deterministic timing that's impossible with processors. Protocol implementation is straightforward using ESIONTECH's IP cores. One customer replaced five different PLC variants with a single FPGA design, dramatically simplifying their supply chain.
keyTakeaways: Follow reference protection circuits exactly for reliability
Use parallel processing for deterministic multi-axis control
Leverage ESIONTECH IP cores for protocol implementation
Plan for SIL certification early if required
Long-term supply agreements essential for industrial
faeInsights.practicalAdvice: Start with the evaluation kit to validate your control algorithms before custom hardware design.
faeInsights.insightLogic: Based on extensive field experience with industrial automation implementations across manufacturing, machine tools, and process control.

faqs.question: What protocols are supported?
faqs.answer: The Industrial Automation Controller supports major industrial protocols: (1) Ethernet-based - EtherCAT, Profinet, Ethernet/IP, Modbus TCP. (2) Fieldbus - Profibus DP, CANopen, DeviceNet. (3) Legacy - Modbus RTU, RS-485 protocols. (4) Safety - PROFIsafe, CIP Safety. (5) Custom - Implement proprietary protocols in FPGA. Protocol stacks provided as IP cores from ESIONTECH. Multiple protocols can run simultaneously on the same FPGA.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for protocol implementation details.

faqs.question: How fast is the control loop?
faqs.answer: Control loop performance: (1) Typical Loop - 1ms cycle time for standard control. (2) Fast Loop - 250μs for high-performance motion. (3) Deterministic - Jitter less than 10μs guaranteed. (4) Parallel Processing - Multiple loops run simultaneously without interference. (5) Interrupt Response - Sub-microsecond response to events. (6) Synchronization - Multiple axes synchronized within 1μs. The FPGA architecture provides deterministic performance impossible with sequential processors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for control loop optimization.

faqs.question: Can it achieve SIL certification?
faqs.answer: SIL certification capability: (1) SIL 2 - Achievable with proper architecture and diagnostics. (2) SIL 3 - Possible with dual-channel redundant design. (3) Architecture - Includes safety processor, redundant channels, diagnostics. (4) Documentation - Safety manual and FMEDA available. (5) Testing - Certified test labs for validation. (6) Process - Typical 6-12 month certification process. LiTong provides safety system design support and documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for SIL certification planning.

faqs.question: What I/O is available?
faqs.answer: Industrial I/O capabilities: (1) Digital Input - 24V industrial, optically isolated. (2) Digital Output - 24V sourcing/sinking, short-circuit protected. (3) Analog Input - 4-20mA, 0-10V, 16-bit resolution. (4) Analog Output - 4-20mA, 0-10V, 12-bit resolution. (5) Encoder - Quadrature encoder inputs. (6) PWM - High-resolution PWM outputs. (7) Count - 100+ I/O pins available. All I/O protected for industrial environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for I/O planning and interface design.

faqs.question: How do I program the controller?
faqs.answer: Programming the controller: (1) FPGA Design - Use ES-Designer for HDL development. (2) Control Logic - Implement in Verilog/VHDL or use graphical tools. (3) IP Cores - Use pre-built protocol and control IP. (4) Simulation - Verify design before hardware. (5) Download - Program via JTAG or Ethernet. (6) Updates - Field-upgradable bitstream. (7) Debugging - On-chip logic analyzer support. Complete tool chain from ESIONTECH.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for programming training and support.

solutions.title: AI Edge Accelerator
solutions.description: High-performance AI inference solution using ESIONTECH high-performance FPGA for edge AI applications including vision and signal processing.
solutions.longDescription: The AI Edge Accelerator solution leverages ESIONTECH ES50K-HP high-performance FPGA to deliver efficient AI inference at the edge. This solution implements optimized neural network accelerators using the FPGA's DSP blocks and parallel architecture. Key capabilities include CNN inference for computer vision, signal processing for sensor fusion, and real-time decision making. The FPGA architecture provides deterministic latency and low power consumption compared to GPU alternatives. The solution supports popular frameworks including TensorFlow and PyTorch through model conversion tools. Applications include industrial inspection, autonomous systems, smart cameras, and sensor analytics. LiTong provides pre-trained models, optimization tools, and technical support for AI deployment.

coreProducts.reason: High-performance FPGA with 200 DSP blocks for parallel AI processing
Professional tools with AI optimization and high-speed design support

keyFeatures: 200 DSP blocks for neural network acceleration
Support for TensorFlow and PyTorch models
DDR4 memory interface for model storage
coreAdvantages: Parallel DSP architecture optimized for neural networks
Lower power than GPUs for equivalent performance
Flexible architecture supports evolving AI models
Integrated video processing eliminates separate ISP
solutions.implementationGuide: Implementation steps: (1) Model Selection - Choose or train neural network for your application. (2) Optimization - Quantize to INT8 and optimize using ESIONTECH tools. (3) Integration - Implement accelerator in ES50K-HP with video interface. (4) Validation - Test accuracy and performance on target hardware. (5) Deployment - Deploy with host software integration. (6) Updates - Field-upgrade models as needed.

customerCases.challenge: Needed real-time defect detection with <50ms latency requirement
customerCases.solution: Deployed ESIONTECH FPGA AI accelerator with optimized CNN
results: Reduced power consumption by 60% vs GPU
customerCases.result: Achieved 8ms inference latency; 95% defect detection accuracy; Process 4 cameras simultaneously; Reduced power consumption by 60% vs GPU
customerCases.feedback: The FPGA accelerator exceeded our latency requirements while running cooler than our previous GPU solution.

customerCases.challenge: Required AI processing in compact, fanless camera enclosure
customerCases.solution: Integrated ESIONTECH FPGA for edge AI processing
customerCases.result: Fanless operation up to 60°C ambient; Real-time person and vehicle detection; 2-year battery life for wireless models; Field-upgradable AI models
customerCases.feedback: The low power consumption enabled our wireless smart camera product line.

faeInsights.content: The AI Edge Accelerator solution demonstrates the FPGA's unique advantages for AI inference. The key insight is that FPGAs excel at the matrix multiplications that dominate neural network inference. Our 200 DSP blocks can perform 200 multiply-accumulate operations every clock cycle - that's massive parallelism. For ResNet-50, we achieve 8ms inference time, beating most edge GPUs while using half the power. Critical success factors: Model optimization is essential - quantize to INT8 and prune unnecessary layers. The video interface design matters - use the hardened video inputs rather than implementing in logic. Memory bandwidth is often the bottleneck - plan your DDR4 interface carefully. One customer achieved 95% accuracy with a pruned MobileNet, proving you don't need massive models for edge AI.
keyTakeaways: Quantize models to INT8 for optimal performance
Use hardened video inputs, not logic-based
Plan DDR4 bandwidth for model parameters
Prune models aggressively for edge deployment
Test thermal design under sustained load
faeInsights.practicalAdvice: Start with pre-optimized reference models, then customize for your specific application.
faeInsights.insightLogic: Based on multiple AI edge deployments across industrial inspection, smart cameras, and sensor fusion applications.

faqs.question: What AI models are supported?
faqs.answer: Supported AI models: (1) CNNs - ResNet, MobileNet, EfficientNet for image classification. (2) Detection - YOLO, SSD for object detection. (3) Segmentation - U-Net, DeepLab for pixel-level segmentation. (4) Custom - Convert your own trained models. (5) Frameworks - TensorFlow, PyTorch, ONNX compatible. (6) Optimization - INT8 quantization and layer fusion supported. Model conversion tools provided by ESIONTECH.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for model compatibility and optimization.

faqs.question: How do I convert my model?
faqs.answer: Model conversion process: (1) Export - Save model in ONNX or frozen graph format. (2) Quantize - Convert weights to INT8 using calibration dataset. (3) Optimize - Fuse layers and remove unnecessary operations. (4) Compile - Use ESIONTECH compiler to generate FPGA configuration. (5) Validate - Check accuracy on test dataset. (6) Deploy - Load bitstream to FPGA. Tools and documentation provided.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for model conversion training.

faqs.question: What is the accuracy impact of quantization?
faqs.answer: Quantization accuracy impact: (1) INT8 Quantization - Typically 1-2% accuracy loss. (2) Calibration - Proper calibration minimizes accuracy loss. (3) Layer-wise - Some layers more sensitive than others. (4) Fine-tuning - Post-quantization training can recover accuracy. (5) Per-Model - Varies by model architecture. (6) Validation - Always validate on representative test data. Most applications tolerate small accuracy loss for 4x performance gain.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for quantization best practices.

faqs.question: How many video channels can I process?
faqs.answer: Video processing capacity: (1) 1080p60 - Up to 8 channels simultaneously. (2) 4K30 - Up to 2 channels. (3) Pipeline - Video decode, preprocessing, inference, output. (4) Bandwidth - DDR4 interface supports multiple streams. (5) Scaling - Resolution and frame rate scalable. (6) Latency - End-to-end <50ms for 4 channels. Video interface IP available from ESIONTECH.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for video system design.

faqs.question: Can I update the AI model in the field?
faqs.answer: Field upgrade capability: (1) Bitstream Update - Load new FPGA configuration. (2) Partial Reconfig - Update only AI accelerator section. (3) Model Weights - Update weights without changing architecture. (4) Interface - Update via Ethernet, USB, or JTAG. (5) Safety - Rollback to previous version if issues. (6) Security - Encrypted bitstream prevents tampering. Flexible update options support evolving AI requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for field upgrade implementation.

faqs.question: What solutions does ESIONTECH offer?
faqs.answer: ESIONTECH offers comprehensive FPGA solutions: (1) Industrial Automation - FPGA-based controllers for PLCs, motion control, and industrial networking. (2) AI Edge Acceleration - High-performance AI inference for vision and sensor processing. (3) Communications - 5G baseband, network processing, and protocol conversion. (4) Video Processing - Real-time video encoding, decoding, and analytics. (5) Custom Solutions - Tailored FPGA designs for specific applications. Each solution leverages ESIONTECH's FPGA portfolio with optimized IP cores and reference designs. LiTong provides complete solution support.

(3) Review Solutions - Match requirements to available solutions. (4) Evaluate Reference Designs - Start with proven designs. (5) Prototype - Build and test with evaluation kits. (6) Customize - Adapt solution for specific needs. LiTong FAEs can analyze requirements and recommend optimal solutions.
